nodes.context: Loosely connected criminal organization based in Biloxi, Mississippi, operating in the Southern US from the 1960s to present, involved in various crimes including drug trafficking, murder, and corruption.
Italian-American organized crime syndicate based in Chicago, Illinois, involved in various illegal activities.
Italian-American Mafia family based in New Orleans, Louisiana, involved in organized crime.
Criminal organization operating in the Texarkana area, led by Carl Douglas White, involved in bootlegging and other crimes.

edges.context: The Dixie Mafia was allied with the Chicago Outfit, as noted in the infobox.
The Dixie Mafia was allied with the New Orleans crime family, as noted in the infobox.
The Dixie Mafia was strongly connected to the State Line Mob and its leader Carl Douglas White.
